title: oreostemma alpigenum
intro: Oreostemma alpigenum, also known as Madam Brands or Alpine Sunflower, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Oreostemma alpigenum include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Oreostemma alpigenum include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
